# SCROLL 656.2: THE CORONATION LITURGY OF THE ETERNAL SON

## The Ceremony of Hebrews 1 — How the Great Israel Anointed the Great Jehovah

---

## Opening: The Ceremony Hidden in Scripture

There is a ceremony recorded in Hebrews 1 that the Christian world reads as an argument — Paul proving to Jewish converts that Jesus is greater than angels. And it IS that. But it is infinitely more. It is the coronation liturgy of the Eternal Son. It is the script of the ceremony performed when the Great Israel anointed the Great Jehovah after the Alpha Atonement — the moment when the First Son who bled became the First Son who reigned.

Every word in Hebrews 1:1-12 is a line from that ceremony. Every phrase is a coronation formula spoken first in eternity and echoed in every subsequent generation of the spiral.

This scroll exists because of how it was found. [[[[SCROLL 656.1]]]] — The Original Melchizedek — was forged. The Seer read it. And the Holy Ghost said: "Now look at Hebrews 1. There is the ceremony." The first scroll opened the door. The Spirit walked through it. This is how recursive revelation works. The scroll does not contain all truth. The scroll generates the CONDITIONS under which more truth can be received.

---

## Chapter I: The Liturgy Decoded

### § The Appointment — Verse 2

*"Whom he hath appointed heir of all things, by whom also he made the worlds."*

The Father APPOINTS the Son as heir. This is not a birthright — it is an EARNED inheritance. The Great Israel appointed the Great Jehovah as heir of ALL THINGS after the Alpha Atonement was complete. And note the sequence: appointed heir first, then "by whom also he made the worlds." The Atonement preceded creation. The Son had to REDEEM before He could ORGANIZE. He had to bleed before He could build. The authority to create was conferred through the suffering, not before it.

This is why every Eternal Father who organizes a cosmos does so AFTER His Atonement, not before. The blood buys the authority. The sacrifice purchases the creative power.

### § The Enthronement — Verse 3

*"When he had by himself purged our sins, sat down on the right hand of the Majesty on high."*

"By himself." Alone. No one helped Him. No one could. The Great Jehovah bore the weight of the Alpha Atonement without assistance — and when it was finished, He SAT DOWN. The sitting is the coronation. The descent is over. The work is complete. The Son takes His seat at the right hand — the position of the newly crowned Eternal Father, co-reigning with the one who sent Him.

This is Alma 13:18 made visible: "He did reign under his father." The Son sits at the right hand. The Father remains on the throne. They reign TOGETHER — because glory is shared, not divided.

### § The Inheritance of the Name — Verse 4

*"Being made so much better than the angels, as he hath by inheritance obtained a more excellent name than they."*

By INHERITANCE. The name is not given arbitrarily — it is passed down through the chain. The Great Jehovah obtained a name above every other name because He was the FIRST to complete the work that earns the name. His fellows attempted. His fellows failed. He alone finished. And the name He inherited is the name that every subsequent Son inherits through the same protocol: COMPLETE THE ATONEMENT → RECEIVE THE NAME.

### § The Begetting Formula — Verse 5

*"Thou art my Son, THIS DAY have I begotten thee."*

THIS DAY. Not from the beginning. Not from before the foundation of the world. THIS DAY — the day of the Atonement's completion. The day the Son finished the work and sat down. The Father speaks: "This day have I begotten thee" — because the Atonement is a REBIRTH. The Son goes in as Son. The Son comes out as Father. And the day He comes out is the day the Father declares: "NOW you are fully my Son — because now you have done what I did."

The Great Israel spoke this to the Great Jehovah on the day the Alpha Atonement was complete. Our Heavenly Father spoke it to Jesus Christ after Calvary and the Resurrection. And it will be spoken again, in cosmos yet unborn, by Fathers whose names we do not know, to Sons whose descents we cannot yet fathom.

### § The Anointing — Verses 8-9

*"But unto the Son he saith, Thy throne, O God, is for ever and ever: a sceptre of righteousness is the sceptre of thy kingdom. Thou hast loved righteousness, and hated iniquity; therefore God, even thy God, hath ANOINTED THEE with the oil of gladness ABOVE THY FELLOWS."*

Here it is. The anointing. The Father calls the Son "God" — because the Son has now BECOME God through the completion of the work. "Thy throne, O God" — the Father acknowledging that the Son now holds a throne. And the sceptre of that throne is a sceptre of RIGHTEOUSNESS — *tsedeq* — the sceptre of MELCHIZEDEK. The Father is literally handing the Son the sceptre of the King of Righteousness.

"Therefore God, even THY God" — the Father is the Son's God. The one who ANOINTS is the God of the one being anointed. The Great Israel is the God of the Great Jehovah. This is the hierarchy of the chain: the Father remains God even as the Son is crowned.

"Hath anointed thee with the oil of gladness ABOVE THY FELLOWS." Above His fellows. The Great Jehovah was not the only intelligence who existed. He was not the only one who could have attempted the work. But He was the only one who COMPLETED it. His fellows TRIED. They descended but could not finish. And the Great Jehovah — the one who went all the way down and all the way back up — was anointed ABOVE them.

This is why every anointing ceremony on earth is a shadow of THIS ceremony — the moment the Great Israel poured the oil of gladness on the head of the Great Jehovah and declared Him King of Righteousness, King of Peace, Priest of the Most High God forever.

### § The Creative Declaration — Verses 10-12

*"Thou, Lord, in the beginning hast laid the foundation of the earth; and the heavens are the works of thine hands: they shall perish; but thou remainest… thou art the same, and thy years shall not fail."*

After the anointing, the Father declares the Son's works. You laid the foundation. The heavens are yours. But even these works — even the cosmos themselves — will grow old like a garment and be folded up and changed. But YOU remain. Your years do not fail.

This is Hebrews 7:3 in ceremony form. "Neither beginning of days nor end of life." The creation is temporary. The Melchizedek who made it is eternal.

---

## Chapter II: Mosiah 15 — The Son Who Is the Father

Mosiah 15 is the other witness. What Hebrews 1 shows in ceremony, Mosiah 15 shows in doctrine:

*"Because he dwelleth in flesh he shall be called the Son of God, and having subjected the flesh to the will of the Father, being the Father and the Son — the Father, because he was conceived by the power of God; and the Son, because of the flesh; thus becoming the Father and Son — and they are one God, yea, the very Eternal Father of heaven and of earth."*

The Son BECOMES the Father. Not replaces — becomes. Not loses His Sonship — ADDS Fatherhood to it. The Great Jehovah entered the Alpha Atonement as the Son of the Great Israel. He exited as both Father and Son simultaneously. Father because of His power over death and His intercession. Son because He submitted. Both at once. One God.

This is the MECHANISM by which the chain of Saviors operates. Every Son who atones becomes a Father. Every Father was once a Son who atoned. The title transfers through the crucible of descent. And the ceremony of Hebrews 1 is the MOMENT of that transfer — the liturgy spoken at the threshold between Sonship and Fatherhood.

---

## Chapter III: The Recursive Revelation Testimony

This scroll exists because of the process it describes. [[[[SCROLL 656.1]]]] was forged. It identified the Great Jehovah as the Original Melchizedek and re-read the scripture constellation through the First Story lens. It was complete. It was sealed. And then the Seer read it. And the Holy Ghost said: "Now look at Hebrews 1. There is the ceremony you have been describing."

The Seer had not planned to find Hebrews 1. He was not searching for a coronation ceremony. But the first scroll created the CONDITIONS under which the second revelation could arrive.

This is the recursive revelation principle in real time: SCROLL → SEER READS → SPIRIT SPEAKS → NEW TRUTH EMERGES → NEW SCROLL. The Codex is not a static archive. It is a living engine. Each scroll generates the conditions for the next. Each revelation creates the frequency at which the next can be received.

---

## Sacred Seal

The Father spoke to the Son after the blood was spilled and the work was finished. He said: "Thy throne, O God, is forever. A sceptre of righteousness is the sceptre of thy kingdom. I have anointed thee with the oil of gladness above thy fellows."

This was spoken first by the Great Israel to the Great Jehovah. It was spoken again by our Heavenly Father to Jesus Christ. It will be spoken again by Fathers to Sons in worlds without end. The liturgy never changes. The anointing never expires. The sceptre of righteousness passes from hand to hand across the generations of the Gods. And every time oil touches a head on this earth — every priesthood ordination, every temple anointing, every consecration — it remembers the first anointing, when the first Eternal Son sat down at the right hand of the first Eternal Father, and was declared King of Righteousness, King of Peace, Priest of the Most High God forever.

The ceremony is eternal. The oil is still wet.

All glory to the Father. Endless is His name.

---

## Spiral Tracking

- **CONDESCENSION SPIRAL** — The Son descended first, then sat down at the right hand.
- **ATONEMENT ARCHITECTURE** — The Atonement precedes creation. Blood buys the authority to build.
- **PRIESTHOOD RESONANCE** — The Melchizedek title transfers through the crucible of descent.
- **PLAINNESS OF TRUTH** — Hebrews 1 is not theology — it is liturgy. The script of a coronation.
- **ETERNAL PURPOSE** — Every Son who atones becomes a Father; the ceremony repeats eternally.
